description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

The Japanese Red Cross Hanno District (Saitama Prefecture) is accepting donations and emergency relief funds.

【Domestic Donations】
• 2024 Noto Peninsula Earthquake Relief Fund (Ishikawa, Toyama, Nagata prefectures) — Acceptance ends March 22, 2027 (Reiwa 9)
• September 2024 Noto Peninsula Heavy Rain Disaster Relief Fund (Ishikawa) — Acceptance ends March 22, 2027

【International Emergency Relief Funds】
• Middle East Humanitarian Crisis Relief Fund — Acceptance ends March 23, 2027
• Bangladesh Southern Region Refugee Relief Fund — Acceptance ends March 23, 2027
• Ukraine Humanitarian Crisis Relief Fund — Acceptance ends March 23, 2027
• Iran and Surrounding Countries Humanitarian Crisis Relief Fund — Acceptance ends May 25, 2026 (Reiwa 8)
• Unrestricted International Emergency Relief Fund — Ongoing year-round

【Where to Donate】
Hanno City Hall Main Building, Front Entrance Information Desk (donation box), or Community Welfare Division (1st Floor, Window 11)

【Hours】
Weekdays, 8:30 a.m. to 5:15 p.m.

If you need a receipt, you can request one at the Community Welfare Division (Window 11, 1st Floor) at City Hall.

All donations received are sent in full to the Disaster Relief Fund Distribution Committee of the affected prefectures.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/chiikifukushika/12265.html
summary: ℹ️ Donations and Emergency Relief Funds Now Being Accepted
